basic_details.job_title: NHDC Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Manager, Dy. Manager and More Posts
basic_details.post_name: Manager (Finance& Accounts), Dy. Manager (Comm.), Asst. Manager (Comm.) and Sr. Officer (Comm.)
basic_details.short_information: The National Handloom Development Corporation (NHDC) has officially announced the Manager (Finance & Accounts), Dy. Manager (Commercial), Asst. Manager (Commercial), and Sr. Officer (Commercial) Recruitment 2026 with 7 openings. The detailed notification was published on 18 April 2026 at the official website. Candidates who meet the age criteria of up to 42 years for Manager, 40 years for Dy. Manager, 38 years for Asst. Manager, and 35 years for Sr. Officer, and hold qualifications such as Chartered Accountant/Cost Accountant/MBA (Finance) or Degree/Diploma in Textiles Technology/Engineering/C

age_limit.age_limit: Max age: 42 years for Manager (F&A), 40 years for Dy. Manager (Comm.), 38 years for Asst. Manager (Comm.), 35 years for Sr. Officer (Comm.)
age_limit.details: Manager (Finance& Accounts): Maximum age 42 years. Relaxation: As per Govt. directives for SC/ST/OBC/PWD/EWS/Ex-Servicemen. 5 years for Internal Candidates (if in service for last 03 yrs). Deputy Manager (Commercial): Maximum age 40 years. Relaxation: As per Govt. directives for SC/ST/OBC/PWD/EWS/Ex-Servicemen. 5 years for Internal Candidates (if in service for last 03 yrs). Assistant Manager (Commercial): Maximum age 38 years. Relaxation: As per Govt. directives for SC/ST/OBC/PWD/EWS/Ex-Servicemen. 5 years for Internal Candidates (if in service for last 03 yrs). Senior Officer (Commercial): Maximum age 35 years. Relaxation: As per Govt. directives for SC/ST/OBC/PWD/EWS/Ex-Servicemen. 5 years for Internal Candidates (if in service for last 03 yrs).

qualification.education_qualification: Chartered Accountant/Cost Accountant/MBA (Finance) for Manager; Degree/Diploma in Textiles Technology/Engineering/Chemistry for Commercial posts.
qualification.details: Manager (Finance& Accounts): Chartered Accountant from the Institute of Chartered Accountants of India OR Cost Accountant from the Institute of Cost Accountants of India OR MBA with specialization in Finance (Full time two years) from a university recognized by University Grant Commission / Institution recognized by AICTE. Minimum 10 years of experience in Finance/Accounts/Internal Audit, with 4 years in the scale of 50000-160000 (IDA) or equivalent. Deputy Manager (Commercial): Degree in Textiles Technology/ Textiles Engineering from a university recognized by UGC or AICTE OR Diploma in Textiles Technology/ Textiles Engg./Handloom Technology from a recognized university/institute. OR Degree in Textiles Chemistry/ Chemical Technology/ M.Sc. (Organic Chemistry/Textile Chemistry) from a university recognized by UGC or AICTE OR Diploma in Textiles Chemistry/ Chemical Technology for Dyes & Chemicals from a recognized university/institute. Minimum 8 years of Marketing & Technical experience (yarn or dyes & chemicals), with 4 years in the scale of 40000-140000 (IDA) or equivalent (14 years in case of diploma holder). Assistant Manager (Commercial): Degree in Textiles Technology/ Textiles Engineering from a university recognized by UGC or AICTE OR Diploma in Textiles Technology/ Textiles Engg./Handloom Technology from a recognized university/institute. OR Degree in Textiles Chemistry/ Chemical Technology/ M.Sc. (Organic Chemistry/Textile Chemistry) from a university recognized by UGC or AICTE OR Diploma in Textiles Chemistry/ Chemical Technology for Dyes & Chemicals from a recognized university/Institute. Minimum 5 years of experience in marketing/production of yarn or process house, with 4 years in the scale of 27000-95000 or equivalent (9 years in case of diploma holder). Senior Officer (Commercial): Degree in Textiles Technology/ Textiles Engineering / MBA (Marketing / Rural Management) from a University / Institute recognized by UGC or AICTE OR Diploma in Textiles Technology / Textiles Engg./Handloom Technology from a recognized university/Institution. OR Degree in Textiles Chemistry/ Chemical Technology / MBA (Marketing) / M. Sc. (Organic/Textile Chemistry) from a University / Institute recognized by UGC or AICTE OR Diploma in Textiles Chemistry/ Chemical Technology from a recognized university/Institution. Minimum 4 years of experience for Degree Holder/MBA/M.Sc (2 years in scale of 22500-80000) and minimum 5 years for Diploma Holder (3 years in scale of 22500-80000 or equivalent).

salary_details.salary_range: Rs. 60000-180000 for Manager (F&A), Rs. 50000-160000 for Dy. Manager (Comm.), Rs. 40000-140000 for Asst. Manager (Comm.), Rs. 27000-95000 for Sr. Officer (Comm.)
salary_details.details: Manager (Finance& Accounts): Pay Scale: Rs. 60000-180000. Gross Pay (approx): Rs. 1,31,040/- p.m. Deputy Manager (Commercial): Pay Scale: Rs. 50000-160000 (IDA). Gross Pay (approx): Rs. 1,09,200/- p.m. Assistant Manager (Commercial): Pay Scale: Rs. 40000-140000 (IDA). Gross Pay (approx): Rs. 87,360/- p.m. Senior Officer (Commercial): Pay Scale: Rs. 27000-95000. Gross Pay (approx): Rs. 59,000/- p.m.

selection_process: Personal Interview Written Test Group Discussion
how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the NHDC Various Posts Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 11-05-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of NHDC to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for NHDC Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date for submission of online applications for NHDC Recruitment 2026 is 08 May 2026. It is advisable to apply well before the deadline to avoid any last-minute technical issues.

faq.question: Q2. What are the different posts available in NHDC Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: NHDC Recruitment 2026 offers positions such as Manager (Finance& Accounts), Deputy Manager (Commercial), Assistant Manager (Commercial), and Senior Officer (Commercial).

faq.question: Q3. What is the minimum qualification required for the Manager (Finance& Accounts) post?
faq.answer: The minimum qualification for the Manager (Finance& Accounts) post is Chartered Accountant, Cost Accountant, or an MBA with specialization in Finance from a recognized institution.

faq.question: Q4. Is there any application fee for NHDC Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Yes, there is an application fee of Rs. 500 for General/OBC/UR candidates. SC/ST/PWD & Internal candidates are exempted from paying the application fee.

faq.question: Q5. What is the maximum age limit for the Senior Officer (Commercial) post?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Senior Officer (Commercial) post is 35 years. Age relaxation is applicable as per government directives for certain categories.

faq.question: Q6. How many vacancies are available in NHDC Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: A total of 7 vacancies are available across various posts in NHDC Recruitment 2026. The detailed breakdown is provided in the vacancy details section.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for NHDC Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The selection process for NHDC Recruitment 2026 typically includes a Written Test, Group Discussion, and a Personal Interview.

faq.question: Q8. What is the salary offered for the Manager (Finance& Accounts) post?
faq.answer: The Manager (Finance& Accounts) post offers a pay scale of Rs. 60000-180000, with an approximate gross pay of Rs. 1,31,040/- per month.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification for NHDC Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF for NHDC Recruitment 2026 can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section on this page or directly from the NHDC official website.

faq.question: Q10. What is the location of the job for NHDC Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The jobs are located in Noida, Uttar Pradesh, with the pincode 201306.
